title: Tilray Brands Reports Strong First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results with Record Q1 Net Revenue of $210 Million
text: Tilray Brands reported record Q1 net revenue of $210 million for fiscal 2026 with strong financial performance. The company reported net income of $34.2 million, a significant improvement from the net loss of $58.8 million in the prior year quarter. Adjusted EBITDA increased 67% to $10.3 million from $6.2 million in the prior year quarter. International cannabis revenue grew 52% year-over-year. The company continued its focus on operational efficiency and cost management. Distribution revenue grew, maintaining the company's diversified revenue streams across cannabis, beverages, and distribution segments. The strong Q1 performance demonstrated the company's ability to generate profitable growth through strategic acquisitions and operational improvements.
